cloudAppHelp: Pick the app your appliances are bound to. MSmartHome is the default; NetHome Plus, Midea Air and Ariston Clima talk the legacy V1 cloud. V1-firmware appliances on the LAN are not supported.
userHelp: E-mail address used in the chosen cloud app
passwordHelp: Password used in the chosen cloud app
intervalHelp: How often the adapter polls each device locally over the LAN. Range 5–3600 seconds (default 30).
deviceListHelp: Click "Refresh devices" to pull the appliance list from the cloud account and merge in any IPs LAN discovery has seen. For appliances on a different subnet or behind a Wi-Fi access point that isolates clients, the IP column stays empty — type the IP by hand. The adapter unicast-probes every IP listed here on each discovery cycle in addition to broadcasting on its own subnets. Token and key are fetched from the cloud automatically; if the handshake still fails you can paste both here by hand (e.g. from msmart-ng). Press save to apply.
